requirement: LMT batteries must have digital passport accessible via QR code by 2027-02-18
gap: e-Scooter Pro uses LMT battery without digital passport system
recommended_action: Implement battery passport system with QR code and data matrix containing battery information

alert.message: URGENT: e-Scooter Pro (P013-A) non-compliant with EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542. LMT battery requires digital passport by 2027-02-18. Action: Implement battery passport system. Source: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX:32023R1542

regulation: REACH Regulation (EC) 1907/2006 — PFAS/PFHxA restriction (Annex XVII Entry 68)
requirement: Perfluorohexanoic acid (PFHxA) restricted in textile coatings by 2025-02-25
gap: PulseBand strap uses PFAS/PFHxA coating which is now restricted
recommended_action: Remove PFAS/PFHxA from textile coatings and replace with alternative water-resistant materials

alert.message: URGENT: PulseBand (P006-A) non-compliant with REACH PFAS restriction. Remove PFHxA coating by 2025-02-25. Source: https://echa.europa.eu/candidate-list-table

requirement: Mercury prohibited in display backlights (CCFL exemption expired)
gap: ProPanel 27 spare parts still use mercury-containing CCFL backlight
recommended_action: Replace mercury-containing CCFL backlights with LED alternatives in all spare parts

alert.message: URGENT: ProPanel 27 (P010-B) non-compliant with RoHS mercury restriction. CCFL exemption expired, replace with LED by 2024-12-31. Source: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX:32011L0065

regulation: GPSR Regulation (EU) 2023/988 — Button cell battery security (Art. 5)
requirement: Toys with button cell batteries must have child-resistant compartments by 2024-12-13
gap: SingAlong Mic button cell compartment not child-secured (opens with single action)
recommended_action: Redesign battery compartment to require tool or two independent actions to open

alert.message: URGENT: SingAlong Mic (P008-B) non-compliant with GPSR. Button cell compartment must be child-resistant by 2024-12-13. Redesign required. Source: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX:32023R0988

requirement: Portable devices must use USB-C charging port (micro-USB prohibited) by 2024-12-28
gap: LittleView Camera still uses micro-USB charging port instead of USB-C
recommended_action: Replace micro-USB port with USB-C charging port in next hardware revision

alert.message: LittleView Camera (P022-A) non-compliant with RED common charger rule. Replace micro-USB with USB-C by 2024-12-28. Source: https://eur-lex.europa.eu/legal-content/EN/TXT/?uri=CELEX:32014L0053
